heading: Privacy Policy
intro: Your privacy matters to us. Here is a plain-language summary of how DestinyMatrix handles your data.

sections.title: Data Collection
sections.body: The Destiny Matrix Calculator processes your birth date entirely in your browser. We do not store, transmit, or save any personal data you enter. All calculations happen locally on your device.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: We may use essential cookies for site functionality only. No tracking or advertising cookies are used without your explicit consent.

sections.title: Analytics
sections.body: We may collect anonymous, aggregated usage statistics (such as page views) to improve the site. This data cannot be used to identify individual users and is never sold to third parties.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
sections.body: We use Netlify for hosting. Their privacy policy applies to infrastructure-level data. We do not share personal data with any advertising networks.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at hello@destinymatrix.com. We will respond within 48 hours.
